sections.title: Before completion of The Restless Ghost

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Welcome to the church of holy Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Saradomin?

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Surely you have heard of the god, Saradomin?

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: He who creates the forces of goodness and purity in this world? I cannot believe your ignorance!

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: This is the god with more followers than any other! ...At least in this part of the world.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: He who created this world along with his brothers Guthix and Zamorak?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, THAT Saradomin...

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: There... is only one Saradomin...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... I, uh, thought you said something else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry. I'm not from this world.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: That's... strange.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I thought things not from this world were all... You know. Slime and tentacles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't understand. This is an online game!

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I... beg your pardon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am - do you like my disguise?

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Aargh! Avaunt foul creature from another dimension! Avaunt! Begone in the name of Saradomin!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, ok, I was only joking...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice place you've got here.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: It is, isn't it? It was built over 230 years ago.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a quest.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: That's lucky, I need someone to do a quest for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time right now.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Oh well. If you do have some spare time on your hands, come back and talk to me.

sections.title: After completion of The Restless Ghost

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Thank you for getting rid of that awful ghost for me! May Saradomin always smile upon you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a new quest.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Sorry, I only had the one quest.

sections.title: Delivering a letter from the Wise Old Man

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Wise Old Man of Draynor Village said you might reward me if I brought you this.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Oh, did he?

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I'd give you a reward, but you don't seem to have any space for it. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Well, it's still nice of you to bring the message here. Here, I shall bless you...

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Well, maybe you'll find a use for these seeds?

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Well, maybe you'll have a use for these?

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I suppose gems are always acceptable rewards!

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I suppose gems are always acceptable rewards!

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: No, try again.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: I have a question for you.

lines.speaker: Father Aereck
lines.text: Here, have this.
